## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## To Reproduce

```bash
python eyes.py <image_path> [--options]
```

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14]
- Python version: [`python --version`]
- dashscope version: [`pip show dashscope | grep Version`]

## Error Output

```
Paste error output here
```
